arts.ttl: Is Portsmouth v Millwall on TV? Kick-off time, tteam news, tickets and how to watch Championship fixture
arts.sum: All you need to know about Pompey’s EFL Championship fixture with Millwall.

arts.ttl: ‘Best away following I’ve ever seen…think of noise if they had something to cheer’: West Brom and Portsmouth react
arts.sum: Pompey fans once again failed to yield at West Brom, as they backed their team relentlessly in the face of a seventh away defeat on the spin and a 5-1 thrashing. Both sets of fans had then had plenty to say on X, formerly Twitter, here’s a selection of those views.

arts.ttl: Bookies' new predicted Championship table after Portsmouth lose, Cardiff City and Hull City win
arts.sum: Pompey suffered a 5-1 defeat to West Brom at the weekend which has had a significant impact on their final predicted finish in the Championship.

arts.ttl: No sensational Portsmouth reunion on cards for defender amid Middlesbrough exit rumours and Derby links
arts.sum: Pompey are not plotting a sensational return to Fratton Park for Matt Clarke.

arts.ttl: Buoyant Portsmouth boss hails 100 per cent success rate on January transfer targets - and more are on the way
arts.sum: Buoyant Pompey have successfully captured all of their top January targets so far.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss' frank message to latest signing as £1.2m defender in contention to face Millwall
arts.sum: Hayden Matthews has been tasked with hitting the ground running at Pompey.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth stance on potential Middlesbrough raid emerges amid links with former star
arts.sum: Portsmouth are not pursuing a winter reunion with Middlesbrough centre-back Matt Clarke, reporter Neil Allen has said. Portsmouth… The post Portsmouth stance on potential Middlesbrough raid emerges amid links with former star appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Millwall transfer record signing produced ‘unbelievable finish’ in win at Luton Town
arts.sum: Millwall striker Mihailo Ivanovic has earned praise off team-mate George Saville for his performance in Saturday’s 1-0 win over Luton Town. His all-round game today was excellent, not just the goal.

arts.ttl: Tristan Crama happy to stay in right-back position for Millwall
arts.sum: “It was a really good personal thing (to win the award) but the most important thing was the win today and, as a defender, the clean sheet is also good. “It was a tough game but a very important win after the draw in the last minute of the last game,” he told Millwall TV .

arts.ttl: 'Completely false' - rumours linking Portsmouth midfielder with January transfer to Charlton shut down
arts.sum: Rumours linking Owen Moxon with a January transfer window move to Charlton have been shot down.
